## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (or no new lint issues in touched files)
- [ ] User-visible changes noted in [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) (Unreleased)
- [ ] Architectural changes align with [docs/adr/](../docs/adr/) (or ADR proposed)
- [ ] Export/preview path checked if `src/lib/epub.ts`, widgets, or preview CSS changed
